title: Financial Payment Plans
content:
Payment Plans
Morgan State University

---

MONTHLY PAYMENT PLAN OPTIONS

Morgan State University offers monthly payment plans to help students and families manage educational expenses. Payment plans allow you to spread your balance over several months rather than paying in full at the start of the semester.

---

FALL SEMESTER PAYMENT PLAN

Typical Structure:
- Enrollment fee required
- Monthly payments (typically 4-5 months)
- Payments begin before semester starts
- Final payment due during semester

---

SPRING SEMESTER PAYMENT PLAN

Typical Structure:
- Enrollment fee required
- Monthly payments (typically 4-5 months)
- Payments begin before semester starts
- Final payment due during semester

---

SUMMER PAYMENT PLAN

- Shorter payment period
- Fewer installments
- Contact Bursar's Office for details

---

HOW TO ENROLL IN A PAYMENT PLAN

1. Log in to WEBSIS
2. Navigate to Student Account
3. Select Payment Plan option
4. Choose your plan
5. Pay enrollment fee
6. Set up automatic payments (recommended)

---

ENROLLMENT FEES

- Non-refundable enrollment fee required
- Fee varies by semester
- Must be paid to activate plan

---

IMPORTANT DEADLINES

- Payment plan enrollment deadline: Before classes begin
- Monthly payment due dates: Specified in plan agreement
- Late payment fees may apply

---

LATE PAYMENT CONSEQUENCES

If payments are not made on time:
- Late fees assessed
- Registration hold may be placed
- May be removed from payment plan
- Full balance may become due immediately

---

CONTACT

For questions about payment plans:
Bursar's Office
Website: bursar.morgan.edu

How to Make Payment Online:
